ddls:
CREATE TABLE "sizes" (
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size record */,
  "europe" TEXT /* European size */,
  "us" TEXT /* US size */,
  "uk" TEXT /* UK size */,
  "inches" TEXT /* Size in inches */,
  "cm" TEXT /* Size in centimeters */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender for which the size is intended */,
  "age_group" TEXT /* Age group for which the size is intended */,
  "fit_type" TEXT /* Fit type of the size */,
  "brand_specific_size" TEXT /* Brand-specific size */,
  "last_modified" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last modification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the footwear product */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the product */,
  "style" TEXT /* Style of the footwear */,
  "material" TEXT /* Material used in the product */,
  "price" TEXT /* Price of the product */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the size conversion data */,
  "brand" TEXT /* Brand of the product */,
  "color" TEXT /* Color of the product */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender for which the product is intended */,
  "age_group" TEXT /* Age group for which the product is intended */,
  "fit_type" TEXT /* Fit type of the product */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of the product image */,
  "last_modified" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last modification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory record */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* ID of the size */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product in stock */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region where the inventory is located */,
  "warehouse_id" TEXT /* ID of the warehouse where the inventory is stored */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the inventory record */,
  "reorder_level" INTEGER /* Threshold for when to reorder stock */,
  "reorder_quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity to reorder when the stock reaches the reorder level */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region where the customer is located */,
  "preferred_size_system" TEXT /* Preferred size system of the customer */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the customer */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the customer */,
  "height" TEXT /* Height of the customer */,
  "foot_length" TEXT /* Length of the customer's foot */,
  "foot_width" TEXT /* Width of the customer's foot */,
  "last_purchase_date" TEXT /* Date of the customer's last purchase */,
  "total_spent" TEXT /* Total amount spent by the customer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product being reviewed */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who wrote the review */,
  "rating" TEXT /* Rating given by the customer */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Comment provided by the customer */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date when the review was written */,
  "size_purchased" TEXT /* Size of the product purchased */,
  "fit_rating" TEXT /* Rating for the fit of the product */,
  "comfort_rating" TEXT /* Rating for the comfort of the product */,
  "durability_rating" TEXT /* Rating for the durability of the product */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of any images attached to the review */,
  "last_modified" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last modification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "purchases" (
  "purchase_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each purchase */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who made the purchase */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product purchased */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* ID of the size of the product purchased */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product purchased */,
  "purchase_date" TEXT /* Date when the purchase was made */,
  "return_status" TEXT /* Status of the purchase (e.g., completed, returned) */,
  "order_id" TEXT /* ID of the order to which the purchase belongs */,
  "shipping_address" TEXT /* Shipping address for the purchase */,
  "billing_address" TEXT /* Billing address for the purchase */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Payment method used for the purchase */,
  "delivery_date" TEXT /* Date the purchase was delivered */,
  "return_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the return (if applicable) */,
  "last_modified" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last modification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("purchase_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_purchases_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_purchases_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_purchases_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id")
)
